data_source: local parquet cache (to be wired in B2)
notes: B1 scaffold — cointegration.py and tests/ are the only production-quality pieces.
B2 fills strategy.py (build_signals, run_backtest) and portfolio.py (multi-pair logic).
B3 wires run_backtest.py against the live data adapter.
B4 (performance-analyst) will verify market-neutrality (beta to BTC ≈ 0).

Universe constrained to BTC/ETH/SOL — canonical 1m source lacks BNB/ADA/AVAX. 3 symbols give 3 candidate pairs which is enough to validate the framework; B2/B3 owner can extend the universe once the ETL adds the missing symbols.
Future iterations to spawn under the umbrella issue: pairs_kalman, pairs_distance, triplets, statarb_crypto_funding.
